global.description: The ad features a bold red background with promotional text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting the MoonScreen app with a focus on streaming content.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A solid red background occupying the top portion of the ad.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center featuring abstract shapes in a lighter shade of red.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: An abstract shape overlaying the main content area, possibly a circle or square in a lighter tone.

elements.label: Small decorative shape
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Stream the hype' with a smaller line below it saying 'Cancel anytime'.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The word 'MoonScreen' displayed in a prominent position at the top left corner.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A white button with the text 'Start now' located at the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bold and minimalistic, promoting streaming content.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main content area is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
